message:
fix(export): ensure livereload middleware flushes buffered content

The injectingResponseWriter buffers HTML content until it sees </html>
to inject the live-reload script. If HTML never contains </html>, the
content would never be written to the client.

Fix: call irw.Flush() after the handler completes to ensure any
buffered content is always written, even for malformed HTML.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
